integration_counts.installed_packages: ERR - query rejected; retry via different endpoint

initial_observations: 42,697 leads is massive relative to 2,207 opps (~5% conversion territory) - lead hygiene/qualification flow likely matters.
0 EmailMessage rows + 129 Events + 6,625 Tasks suggests Einstein Activity Capture is likely ON (emails aren't persisted to SF) OR email logging is not wired up. Must investigate.
0 Orders/Contracts/Assets: SF is being used for Lead/Opp/Account/Contact + Activities + Cases. No post-sale lifecycle in SF.
396 Apex classes vs only 5 Apex triggers: classes are almost certainly dominated by installed-package code, not bespoke logic.
0 Roles + 0 Public Groups + 0 Sharing Rules: security model is profile + permission-set based, not hierarchy-based. Makes RLS translation easier.
Professional Edition: many advanced features unavailable (limits workflow rules, flow features, etc.). Rebuild can be simpler.
110 permission sets on 43 users is high - likely lots of legacy / package-installed perm sets. Need to see which are actually assigned.
